title: Mental Horror Project
description: Dive into a terrifying and distorted world, where new friends await you — in the form of beautiful monsters!
body:
![MHP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/289b9671fbe80aeb6ff40035014ab1baf119ce6b_0.webp)

**🕯️Description**
-
Dive into a realm where the boundaries between reality and nightmare blur. The Mental Horror Project transforms your Minecraft experience into a psychological thriller, challenging not just your survival skills but your sanity. Every shadow hides a potential threat, and every sound could signal impending doom.​
-
**🧩 Key Features**
-
Sanity System: Monitor your mental state as it fluctuates based on in-game events. Neglecting it can lead to hallucinations, distorted perceptions, and unexpected challenges.​

Terrifying Entities: Encounter a diverse array of horror-themed mobs, each designed to instill fear and keep you on edge.​

Immersive Atmosphere: Enhanced visuals and ambient sounds create a chilling environment that reacts dynamically to your actions and decisions.​

Shader Compatibility: Fully supports popular shaders to amplify the horror ambiance, making every moment visually captivating and terrifying.​

Optimized Performance: Despite its rich features, the modpack is optimized to ensure smooth gameplay across a range of systems.​

**🎮 Gameplay Mechanics**
-

Exploration: Uncover hidden secrets, abandoned structures, and lore-rich environments that tell tales of past tragedies and mysteries.​
